item: {{attacker}} throws a wild punch that barely clips {{defender}}.
similar_to: {{attacker}} throws a wild punch that only clips {{defender}}'s shoulder.

item: The sheer force of the blow sends {{name}} tumbling to the sands.
similar_to: The sheer force of the blow sends {{name}} sprawling onto the arena sand.

item: {{attacker}} delivers a cold, clinical finishing blow, ending {{defender}}'s struggles.
similar_to: {{attacker}} delivers a cold, clinical finishing blow, ending {{defender}}'s life without hesitation.
